document.title: Declaration of Interests for Clinical Evaluation
standards: Council Directive 93/42/EEC of 14 June 1993 as amended by Directive 2007/47/EC concerning medical devices
MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev.4 - Clinical Evaluation: A Guide for Manufacturer and Notified Bodies under Directives 93/42/EEC and 90/385/EEC

sourceSummary.oneLine: Declaration of interests for clinical evaluation of ADD Abyz Digital Detector, report A-TCF-5-065 Rev.0.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports clinical evaluation documentation by recording evaluator selection criteria, evaluator qualifications, and declared human, financial, and contractual relationships with H&abyz Co., Ltd.
keyPoints: The manufacturer holds declarations of interest for evaluators covering financial interrelationship, human interrelationship, and contract information.
The referenced clinical evaluation guidance is MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev.4 under Directives 93/42/EEC and 90/385/EEC.
Evaluator E-01 is Jungman Lee, identified as a clinical evaluator with radiology specialist qualification and 33 years of doctor experience.
Human and financial interrelationships with the manufacturer are recorded as N/A.
Contract information CI-01 records that E-01 was appointed as Clinical Evaluator of H&abyz in 2019.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer should justify evaluator choice through qualifications, documented experience, and a declaration of interest for each evaluator.
evidence.evidenceText: The manufacturer should be able to justify the choice of the evaluators through reference to their qualifications and documented experience, and to present a declaration of interest for each evaluator.

evidence.claim: The human interrelationship items HI-1 through HI-3 are marked N/A.
evidence.evidenceText: HI-1 Employment by the manufacturer. N/A HI-2 Family members ... N/A HI-3 Participation as an investigator in clinical studies of the device, or in pre-clinical testing of the device. N/A

evidence.claim: The financial interrelationship items FI-1 through FI-6 are marked N/A.
evidence.evidenceText: FI-1 Ownership/ shareholding possibly affected by the outcome of the evaluation. N/A FI-2 Grants sponsored by the manufacturer N/A FI-3 Benefits such as travelling or hospitality. N/A FI-4 Interests in connection with the manufacturing of the device or its constituents. N/A FI-5 Interests in connection with intellectual property... N/A FI-6 Other interests or sources of revenues possibly affected by the result of the evaluation. N/A

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the document text references CE MDD, Council Directive 93/42/EEC, Directive 2007/47/EC, and MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev.4 rather than FDA.
Product identification is potentially inconsistent: the title area states ADD Abyz Digital Detector, while the declaration section states Esophageal Stethoscope with temperature models.
The source text contains name variants for the evaluator: Jungman Lee, Jung Man Lee, Jun Man Lee, and Jung Man Lee.
The source text contains apparent OCR or transcription errors, including 'Delarations', 'Orignal', 'AtrhurTech', and unusual date text such as '2004.012'.
